name: gluon-agent
description: Cross-platform Claude Code and Codex plugin with a tiered research system (quick-research, deep-research, deep-research-pro) sharing common research rules, MCP configs, and composable subagent patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Tiered research system: quick, deep, and pro
interface.longDescription: A three-tier research system (quick-research, deep-research, deep-research-pro) with shared research rules, workspace reconstruction, and composable subagent patterns. Quick-research is designed to be absorbed as a subagent by other workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use quick-research to look up a focused question and return sourced findings.
Use deep-research to investigate a topic and produce a source-backed report.
Use deep-research-pro for an exhaustive, unbounded research investigation.
